body_txt: High technology (or magic) available to characters never seems to trickle down to the populace. In particular, if a villain is in possession of a weapon which would be worth millions to the Pentagon, why would he limit himself to robbing banks with it? This especially applies to one-shot enemies on Speculative Fiction series with amazing inventions that have never been seen before — and are never seen again, unless that villain recurs. One suspect is the short half-life of the necessary Plotonium-186 required to power this type of technology. See The World Is Not Ready for a possible justification. Compare No Plans, No Prototype, No Backup , Cut Lex Luthor a Check , Reed Richards Is Useless .
